heading: cyView the response
caption: cyThe response

sections.paymentsOrAgreements: cyPayments or agreements since the claim was made

defendant.name: cyName
defendant.freeLegalAdvice: cyHave you had any free legal advice?

responseToClaim.disputeClaim: cyDo you dispute any other parts of the claim?

responseToClaim.exemptLandlord: cyIs your landlord an exempt landlord under Part 1 of the Housing (Wales) Act 2014?
responseToClaim.tenancyTypeConfirmation: cyIs the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement type given by the claimant correct?

responseToClaim.tenancyStartDateConfirmation: cyIs the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement start date given by the claimant correct?
responseToClaim.tenancyStartDate: cyCorrected tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement start date
responseToClaim.possessionNoticeReceived: cyDid the claimant give you notice of their intention to begin possession proceedings?
responseToClaim.noticeReceivedDate: cyWhen did you receive notice from the claimant?

responseToClaim.rentArrearsAmount: cyAdmitted amount owed in rent arrears
responseToClaim.writtenTerms: cyHas your landlord sent you written terms of the occupation contract?

payments.anyPaymentsMade: cyHave you paid any money to {{claimantName}} since {{claimIssueDate}}?
payments.repaymentPlanAgreed: cyHave you come to any agreement with {{claimantName}} to repay the arrears since {{claimIssueDate}}?
payments.repayArrearsInstalments: cyWould you like to offer to pay your arrears in instalments?
payments.additionalContribution: cyHow much could you afford to pay in addition to the current rent?
payments.additionalContributionFrequency: cyHow frequently could you afford to pay this amount?

household.dependantChildren: A oes gennych chi unrhyw blant sy'n ddibynnol arnoch?
household.otherDependants: cyDo you have any other dependants?
household.otherTenants: cyDo any other adults live in your home?
household.otherTenantsDetails: cyDetails of other adults living in your home?
household.alternativeAccommodation: cyWould you have somewhere else to live if you had to leave your home?
household.alternativeAccommodationDate: cyWhen would you be able to move in?
household.shareAdditional: cyWould you like to share anything about your circumstances?
household.exceptionalHardship: cyWould you experience exceptional hardship if you were asked to leave your home?
household.exceptionalHardshipDetails: cyDetails about the exceptional hardship you’d experience

income.fromJobs: cyIncome from all jobs you do
income.universalCreditApplied: Ydych chi wedi gwneud cais am Gredyd Cynhwysol?

income.moneyFromElsewhereDetails: cyGive details about the other sources of income and how much you usually receive

debts.hasPriorityDebts: A oes gennych chi unrhyw ddyledion blaenoriaeth?
debts.debtTotal: Beth yw'r cyfanswm sy'n ddyledus gennych ar gyfer eich holl ddyledion blaenoriaeth?
debts.debtContribution: Faint ydych yn ei dalu tuag at eich dyledion blaenoriaeth bob wythnos neu fis?

expenses.householdBills: cyHousehold bills (for example, council tax, gas, electricity, water, internet)
expenses.schoolCosts: cySchool costs (for example, uniform and school dinners)

additional.otherConsiderations: Oes yna unrhyw beth arall rydych eisiau ei ddweud wrth y llys fel rhan o'ch ymateb?
additional.otherConsiderationsDetails: cyDetails of what else you want to tell the court

counterclaim.amountKnown: Ydych chi'n hawlio ar gyfer swm penodol o arian?
counterclaim.estimatedMaxAmount: Beth yw uchafswm gwerth eich hawliad?
counterclaim.against: Yn erbyn pwy ydych chi'n gwneud y gwrth-hawliad?
counterclaim.againstName: cyWhat is the name of the person or organisation you are making the counterclaim against?
counterclaim.for: Ar gyfer beth mae eich gwrth-hawliad?
counterclaim.reasons: Beth yw eich rhesymau dros wneud y gwrth-hawliad?
counterclaim.ordersRequested: Pa orchymyn ydych chi’n gofyn i’r tribiwnlys ei wneud?
counterclaim.factsForCourt: Pa ffeithiau hoffech chi i'r llys eu hystyried wrth benderfynu ar yr hawliad?
counterclaim.needHelpWithFees: Ydych chi angen help i dalu'r ffi gwrth-hawliad?
counterclaim.appliedForHwf: A ydych chi eisoes wedi gwneud cais am help gyda'ch ffi gwrth-hawliad?

needHelpWithFeesOptions.YES: cyI need help paying the fee
needHelpWithFeesOptions.NO: cyI do not need help paying the fee

statementOfTruth.body: cyI believe the facts stated in this defence form are true. I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in the truth.
